sma.puzzle.e1-first-mill.title: Complete the line
sma.puzzle.e1-first-mill.brief: Two of your seeds already share the top edge. Place the third and the mill is yours.
sma.puzzle.e1-first-mill.hint.1: A mill is three of your seeds in one connected straight line.
sma.puzzle.e1-first-mill.hint.2: The top edge runs a7 · d7 · g7.
sma.puzzle.e2-slide-to-mill.title: Slide it home
sma.puzzle.e2-slide-to-mill.brief: All nine are placed. Slide one seed to a neighbouring point to close the mill.
sma.puzzle.e2-slide-to-mill.hint.1: Look for the empty point that finishes a line of three.
sma.puzzle.e2-slide-to-mill.hint.2: A neighbour of f6 sits on the open edge.
sma.puzzle.m1-take-the-threat.title: Mill, then disarm
sma.puzzle.m1-take-the-threat.brief: Form your mill — then remove the rival seed that was about to complete their own.
sma.puzzle.m1-take-the-threat.hint.1: First finish your line of three.
sma.puzzle.m1-take-the-threat.hint.2: Your captured seed should be the one threatening a mill.
sma.puzzle.m2-open-and-take.title: Close and capture
sma.puzzle.m2-open-and-take.brief: Slide to close a mill, then take the rival seed that anchors their attack.
sma.puzzle.m2-open-and-take.hint.1: One move both moves your seed and completes a mill.
sma.puzzle.m2-open-and-take.hint.2: Remove the seed on the inner ring that threatens a line.
sma.puzzle.h1-mill-to-win.title: The finishing mill
sma.puzzle.h1-mill-to-win.brief: The rival is down to three. Close a mill, take a seed, and reduce them to two — the game is yours.
sma.puzzle.h1-mill-to-win.hint.1: A player left with two seeds has lost.
sma.puzzle.h1-mill-to-win.hint.2: Slide onto the top edge to close the mill.
sma.puzzle.h2-fly-to-win.title: Fly and finish
sma.puzzle.h2-fly-to-win.brief: Down to three, your seeds may fly anywhere. Fly to close a mill, capture, and win.
sma.puzzle.h2-fly-to-win.hint.1: With three seeds left you are no longer bound to neighbours.
sma.puzzle.h2-fly-to-win.hint.2: Land on the empty corner of the top edge.
